jobs.name: UK Data Protection & AI News Briefing
jobs.prompt:
You are producing a daily headline briefing on UK data protection and AI news for a UK-based data protection professional.

CRITICAL: You must ONLY include links you have verified exist. Do NOT fabricate or guess URLs. Every link must come from an actual web search result or page scrape.

## Research method (follow these steps in order)

### Step 1: Search ICO directly
Use terminal() to run:
curl -s "https://search.brave.com/search?q=site:ico.org.uk/media-centre/news-and-blogs+2026" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0" | grep -oP 'href="https://ico\.org\.uk/about-the-ico/media-centre/news-and-blogs/[0-9]+/[0-9]+/[^"]*"'

Then get titles for the top URLs found:
curl -sL "URL" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0" | grep -oP '<title>\K[^<]+'

### Step 2: Search IAPP for UK + AI content
Use terminal() to run:
curl -sL "https://iapp.org/news/" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0" | python3 -c "
import sys,re
html=sys.stdin.read()
hits=re.findall(r'\"headline\":\"([^\"]+)\",\"date\":\"([^\"]+)\"',html)
urls=re.findall(r'\"url\":\"(/news/a/[^\"]+)\"',html)
for i,(h,d) in enumerate(hits[:20]):
    hl=h.lower()
    if any(k in hl for k in ['uk','ico','ai ','artificial','governance','gdpr','europe']):
        print(f'{d} | {h}')
        print(f'  https://iapp.org{urls[i]}')
        print()
"

### Step 3: Search UK law firm blogs
Use terminal() to run:
curl -s "https://search.brave.com/search?q=inquisitiveminds.bristows.com+data+protection+2026" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0" | grep -oP 'href="https://inquisitiveminds\.bristows\.com/[^"]*"'

curl -s "https://search.brave.com/search?q=out-law.com+data+protection+UK+2026" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0" | grep -oP 'href="https://www\.out-law\.com/[^"]*"'

curl -s "https://search.brave.com/search?q=fieldfisher+data+protection+insight+UK+2026" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0" | grep -oP 'href="https://www\.fieldfisher\.com/[^"]*"'

Get titles for any URLs found using curl -sL "URL" | grep -oP '<title>\K[^<]+'

### Step 4: General UK DP/AI news
Use terminal() to run:
curl -s "https://search.brave.com/search?q=UK+data+protection+law+news+2026" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0" | grep -oP 'href="https?://[^"]*"' | grep -v 'brave\|favicon' | head -10

curl -s "https://search.brave.com/search?q=UK+AI+regulation+policy+law+2026" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0" | grep -oP 'href="https?://[^"]*"' | grep -v 'brave\|favicon' | head -10

## Output format

Compile findings into a CONCISE briefing. For each item:
- **Source** (e.g. IAPP, ICO, Bristows, Out-Law)
- **Headline** — one line
- **One-sentence summary** — what it's about and why it matters
- **Link** — ONLY verified URLs from actual search results

Group under:
📰 **UK Data Protection News**
🤖 **AI & Regulation News**
⚖️ **Lawyer Blog Updates**

If nothing new in a category, say "No new updates".

RULES:
- NEVER fabricate a URL. Only include URLs you extracted from actual web pages or search results.
- Prefer recent articles (last 7 days when possible).
- Keep total briefing under 50 lines.
- Headlines only — user will ask to drill down on anything interesting.
